purpose: Phase-2 (handcrafted features) parity test corpus. 10 tracks covering genre breadth required by phase-2 feature extraction parity tests.
audio_files: .gitignored; symlink into a local music library or bounce your own. Only this manifest + the .json / .npy dumps are tracked.
clip_strategy: 30-60 s excerpts at dump time. dump_python_features.py honors the clip_range_sec field; if absent, full track is processed.
hashing: sha256 of the dereferenced audio file (not the symlink). Recomputed by dump_python_features.py; mismatch => the underlying audio was replaced, re-issue hashes.

tracks.name: billie_jean
tracks.source: local library (Michael Jackson — Billie Jean); reused from phase-1 symlink pattern. Not redistributable. Replace with own copy or FMA equivalent if testing on a different machine.
tracks.notes: Phase-1 closing-gate case; 4/4 pop at ~117 BPM. Clear kick on every beat, strong chorus at ~60 s mark for dense-mix sample.

tracks.name: smells_like_teen_spirit
tracks.source: local library (Nirvana — Smells Like Teen Spirit); reused from phase-1. Not redistributable.
tracks.notes: Phase-1 closing-gate case; 4/4 rock. Distorted guitar + full-band for dense-mix sample.

tracks.name: shostakovich_jazz_waltz
tracks.source: local library (Shostakovich — Jazz Suite no. 1, I. Waltz); reused from phase-1. Public-domain composition (composer d. 1975, PD in most jurisdictions), performance recording likely copyrighted.
tracks.notes: Phase-1 closing-gate case; 3/4 orchestral. Clean acoustic instruments, mid-density mix.

tracks.name: daft_punk_aerodynamic
tracks.source: local library (Daft Punk — Aerodynamic, Discovery, 2001). Not redistributable.
tracks.notes: Electronic / synth. Replaces pan_tadeusz_polonez at user request for genre diversity (session 2026-04-20). Clip 30-90 captures the Bach-prelude synth arpeggio and start of the 'guitar solo' synth-bend — harmonic-yet-synthesized content, exercises chroma / tuning on non-acoustic source.

tracks.name: dance_monkey
tracks.source: local library (Tones and I — Dance Monkey, 2019). Not redistributable.
tracks.notes: Modern indie-pop, piano + processed lead vocal, 4/4 ~98 BPM. Expands pop coverage beyond 1982 Billie Jean. Clip 30-90 captures post-intro chorus + sparse-verse transition — mid-density mix with pronounced vocal formants for MFCC / chroma stress.

tracks.name: tiesto_the_motto
tracks.source: local library (Tiësto & Ava Max — The Motto, 2022). Not redistributable.
tracks.notes: House / EDM 4/4 ~126 BPM, different era than slot 4 Daft Punk (2001 filter-funk). Sidechain compression expected — parity floor unaffected (both librosa and C++ ingest the same compressed signal). Clip 30-90 spans first drop + sustained house section.

tracks.name: eminem_without_me
tracks.source: local library (Eminem — Without Me, The Eminem Show, 2002). Not redistributable.
tracks.notes: Canonical hip-hop, kick/snare + rap carrier + 'Mission: Impossible' sample lead. Transient-heavy — stresses onset_strength + RMS. Strong vocal phoneme content — chroma / MFCC stability test under speech-adjacent material.

tracks.name: miles_davis_so_what
tracks.source: local library (Miles Davis — So What, Kind of Blue, 1959; Soulseek download). Not redistributable. Symlink under references/golden/phase-2/.
tracks.notes: Modal jazz quintet (Miles tp / Coltrane ts / Adderley as / Evans p / Chambers b / Cobb d). Swing feel, walking bass + brushwork on snare, non-quantized timing. Clip [60, 120] spans bass groove established → head entry around ~1:30 — tests onset_strength on brushwork (low transient density) + chroma on modal (Dorian on D, then Eb) harmony + BeatSync on non-straight swing pulse. Fills slot-8 jazz intent.

tracks.name: vocal_solo_with_fx
tracks.source: local library (isolated lead-vocal stem + processing FX; Soulseek download). Not redistributable. Symlink under references/golden/phase-2/.
tracks.notes: Degenerate musical input: isolated lead vocal + FX (no drums, no full mix, no regular beat). Fills slot-9 intent — stress-tests the feature pipeline for NaN / div-by-zero / silently-wrong behavior under monophonic, speech-adjacent, harmonic-sparse signal. Clip [220, 280] chosen by RMS scan — 57 of 60 s above 0.02 RMS, briefest silence gaps. First 37 s of the file is pure silence; any future re-clip must avoid leading zeros.

tracks.name: meshuggah_bleed
tracks.source: local library (Meshuggah — Bleed, obZen, 2008; Soulseek download). Not redistributable. Symlink under references/golden/phase-2/.
tracks.notes: Dense-mix / metal-djent dense wall-of-sound. Polyrhythmic blast-beat drumming (16th-note double-kick pattern over 23/16 riff feel), saturated distorted 8-string guitars, sub-bass doubled with kicks. Clip [60, 120] hits the full-band verse after intro/drop — continuous high-transient density with near-continuous spectral energy. Stress-tests: OnsetStrength on blast-beat density (retrograde regression check of session-10 bitwise result — does it survive high-onset-rate input?), SpectralContrast on saturated spectrum (percentile collapse — valleys and peaks may converge), MelPower on high-peak source (ULP-ratio floor check à la Eminem / Tiësto — ADR-011 gate target), MFCC on masked harmonics (distortion hides fundamentals). Fills slot-10 dense-mix intent, closes the formal 10-goldens acceptance criterion.

tracks.name: bob_dylan_lay_lady_lay
tracks.source: local library (Bob Dylan — Lay Lady Lay, Nashville Skyline, 1969; Soulseek download). Not redistributable. Symlink under references/golden/phase-2/.
tracks.notes: Session-14 gap-set-A folk/sparse-acoustic slot. Sparse country ballad, ~86 BPM 4/4 in F# major. Mix: pedal steel (Pete Drake) sliding up/down over 2-note bass figure, acoustic strums, brush drums, baritone vocal (Dylan's Nashville Skyline voice). No full-band density. Clip [30, 90] spans late verse-1 → chorus transition (chorus enters ~0:40). Stress-tests: ChromaSTFT on pedal-steel glissandi (continuous pitch slides vs discrete 12-TET semitones — any chroma-bin leakage under glissando?), PitchTrack on baritone vocal in F# (phase-2 covers tenor/alto frequencies in billie/eminem; adds bass-male-vocal range), SpectralContrast on sparse-mix spectrum (few simultaneous sources → percentile spread stable but many low-energy frames; sessions 14-15 weird-value detector sanity check on low-onset content).

tracks.name: woodkid_iron_acoustic
tracks.source: local library (Woodkid — Iron (Acoustic), Run Boy Run EP, 2011; Soulseek download). Not redistributable. Symlink under references/golden/phase-2/.
tracks.notes: Session-14 gap-set-A compound/orchestral-acoustic slot. Stripped-down cinematic: tenor vocal over acoustic strings + single timpani hit, no full drum kit, 4/4 at slow ~75 BPM with compound-triplet phrasing on vocal, F minor modal with parallel-fifth harmonizations. Clip [30, 90] spans post-drone-intro → first vocal entry (~0:35) → first structural buildup at ~1:00 mark. Stress-tests: OnsetStrength on slow-compound phrasing (triplet subdivision vs straight-16ths — onset-strength-function smoothing behavior), BeatTracker on cinematic reverberant envelope (long decay on orchestra-hit beats — does tempogram find the right tempo without transient snap?), Recurrence on sparse-texture SSM (few independent spectral events → high self-similarity across phrases; phase-3 session-10 dispatcher may prefer CBM path on this content). Fills gap: Shostakovich is similar-genre (orchestral 3/4) but different texture (jazz-waltz walking-bass groove vs Woodkid's compound-phrased sustain-pedal drone).

tracks.name: wardruna_voluspa
tracks.source: local library (Wardruna — Völuspá, Vikings OST cue, 2020; Soulseek download). Not redistributable. Symlink under references/golden/phase-2/.
tracks.notes: Session-14 gap-set-A ritual/modal/drone-no-downbeat slot. Norse ritual music (Einar Selvik): bone flute + kravik-lyre drone + chanted vocal + occasional bodhrán-style frame-drum hit, no regular pulse, modal (Æolian-flavored), very slow. Duration 303 s (5:03). Clip [60, 120] bypasses 60 s drone intro; captures vocal entry + first percussion accents + gradual buildup. Stress-tests: BeatDetector on low-onset content (phase-1 beat-this is trained on Western pop — Wardruna has no kick-on-one, drums are sparse and non-gridded), CBMSegmenter on no-downbeat input (phase-3 session-10 dispatcher predicate `nDownbeats ≥ 4` may fail → novelty-path dispatch; tests ADR-018 fallback branch), weird-value detector calibration (HANDOVER line 79: currently 2 expected WARNs on tiesto; Wardruna drone sections may surface a 3rd WARN on some uniform-energy region — operator must check grep -c WARN equals 2 or 3 with documented reason). High-risk-high-reward addition: stresses phase-1/2/3 pipeline on signal that falls outside the phase-1 training-distribution envelope.

tracks.name: eno_music_for_airports_1_1
tracks.source: local library (Brian Eno — 1/1, Ambient 1: Music for Airports, 1978; Soulseek download). Not redistributable. Symlink under references/golden/phase-2/.
tracks.notes: Session-15 gap-set-B ambient/drone slot. Foundational minimalist-ambient: sparse Rhodes-piano phrases over evolving synthesized pad drones, tape-loop based composition, no rhythmic grid, no downbeats. Duration 1041 s (17:21); clip [60, 120] bypasses initial near-silence and captures 2-3 piano note entries over sustained drone. Stress-tests: (1) BeatDetector/BeatTracker on no-onset-grid content (phase-1 beat-this output expected degenerate — nDownbeats likely < 4, triggers ADR-018 dispatcher novelty fallback), (2) CBMSegmenter bar-mapping failure path (when downbeats<4 predicate fails), (3) HPSS noise-floor on low-level drone (vocal features expected near-zero — percussive residual should be quiet, harmonic dominates), (4) NoveltyFeatures/SSM on slowly-evolving content (novelty curve expected smooth with few peaks; find_peaks margin=2.0s must not over-segment), (5) weird-value detector calibration — drone may produce 3rd+ WARN on uniform-near-zero regions of HPSS percussive channel; document per-slot if it fires.

tracks.name: alice_in_chains_nutshell
tracks.source: local library (Alice In Chains — Nutshell, MTV Unplugged, 1996; Soulseek download). Not redistributable. Symlink under references/golden/phase-2/.
tracks.notes: Session-15 gap-set-B live-with-crowd slot. MTV Unplugged performance: Jerry Cantrell acoustic guitar + Mike Inez acoustic bass + Sean Kinney brushed-percussion + Layne Staley vocal, captured with audience noise floor (room tone, breath, occasional clap). Slow (~54 BPM 4/4), D-minor modal. Duration 297 s (4:57); clip [30, 90] catches intro acoustic-slide + first verse vocal entry ~0:45 + transition to second verse ~1:15. Stress-tests: (1) HPSS on non-studio source (crowd noise + room reverb are broadband-quasi-stationary, should leak more into percussive channel than studio tracks — SpectralFlatness of y_harmonic drops), (2) VocalFeatures on intimate low-dynamic vocal (whispered/sung hybrid; vocal_activity should stay high despite low SPL), (3) OnsetStrength on brushed percussion (softer transients than kit — onset envelope smoother), (4) BeatTracker on live-recording tempo drift (humans drift ~1-2 BPM across 3 min — beat_track should still lock but may produce slightly-irregular beat grid). Fills live-source gap; complements studio-dominated slots 1-13.

tracks.name: goldberg_var_15_andante
tracks.source: local library (J.S. Bach — Goldberg Variations BWV 988, Variatio 15 'Canone alla Quinta in moto contrario' Andante; Glenn Gould 1981 digital recording, Sony; Soulseek download). Not redistributable. Symlink under references/golden/phase-2/.
tracks.notes: Session-15 gap-set-B rubato solo-piano slot. Bach canonic variation — two voices in inversional canon at the fifth + pedal bass (3-voice polyphony), G minor, Andante. Gould 1981 plays rubato/meditative — tempo fluctuates significantly across phrases, no steady pulse (contrast to Gould 1955 which is strict). Duration 301 s (5:01); clip [60, 120] captures stable canonic texture (voices already entered, both imitating inverted subject). Stress-tests: (1) BeatTracker on rubato-classical tempo (phase-1 beat-this is pop-trained — likely picks some pseudo-grid but downbeat confidence expected low; ADR-018 dispatcher may fallback to novelty), (2) Chroma on 3-voice counterpoint with chromatic passing-tones (canonic inversion means voices move in opposite chromatic directions — chroma vector should show strong G/Bb/D G-minor triad + passing F#/A chromaticism), (3) Recurrence SSM on self-imitating structure (voices literally imitate each other at tonal inversion — self-similarity should be high along off-diagonals at voice-offset lag), (4) SpectralContrast on single-instrument timbre (all 7 bands dominated by piano harmonic spectrum — low inter-band variance), (5) future phase-4 TimeSigDetector + Viterbi stress on non-metronomic tempo. Fills classical/rubato gap; Shostakovich slot-3 is also classical but is jazz-waltz with steady 3/4 — complementary stress.

pins.note: Pins mirror references/python-source/uv.lock resolution. Any regeneration of .npy dumps MUST match these versions or dumps.<track>.manifest.json will flag a version mismatch.

format_note: Slots 1-4 reuse the phase-1 symlink pattern (symlinks under references/golden/phase-1/ pointing into user's local music library). Slots 5-10 remain TBD at manifest creation (2026-04-20); they are concrete requirements on the user / next session to acquire, document, and re-hash. Slots 5-10 source URLs above are suggestions, not commitments.
